NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM. BASED ON NO APPEARANCE, CLAIMANT/RESPONDENT IS DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO HAVING THE MATTER DECIDED BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; NOT REPORTED

DISCOVERY 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, NOT REPORTED =301/EHG
ORDER OF TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING THE CLAIMS OF MICHAEL TAYLOR AND EJEWWA R FURLOUGH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $600.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT MICHAEL TAYLOR. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $664.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM.
Appearances: Pamela A. Underwood of the Office of the District Attorney (551.9544) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances.
Based on no appearance, claimant/respondent is deemed to have stipulated to having the matter decided by a Judge Pro Tem. The court ruled as follows: granted. Order signed. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Not reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories (Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAMELA UNDERWOOD, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 551-9544 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Not reported =301/EHG
